creator: yerenkow@gmail.com
text:
My usb devices have light indicators on them.

When I put usb flash/bluetooth adapter in PC with windows, it read it
for a few seconds, and after that nothing, no actifity, no lights. Only
If I copy/read something, then lights are seen.

In FreeBSD I see other behaviour, Bluetooth adapter blinks about every
2 seconds; Corsair Voyager GT (usb flash disk) - in about 1-1,1 seconds.
That's wrong, I think.
